lastStrategyDecision.reason: Scanned market evidence is low-conviction for automated intraday execution: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 provides no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.4%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~51 is only moderate (higher slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~21 is weak (lower follow-through probability). Additionally, liveFreshShare/liveFreshCount are 0, indicating no fresh real-time candidates to act on. Maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP framework with bracket exits for auditability and clear stops, but switch to OBSERVE with zero planned trades until RVOL/liquidity/catalyst and fresh signals improve. Tighten risk allocation (position and daily risk) within hard caps given the mediocre tape quality.
